description: GraphQL query that references a known schema property — no errors

domain_guide.rule: Custom properties use property(name: "field") or properties_object, NOT direct field access. StringFilter requires object syntax.

triggered_gotchas.message: Sort by custom properties: `sort: [{ properties: [{ name: "field", order: DESC }] }]`. Built-in: `sort: [{ created_at: { order: DESC } }]`. ASC/DESC are unquoted enum values, NOT strings.
Pagination fields: `total_entries` (NOT total_count), `results`, `has_next_page`, `has_previous_page`. Use `page` and `per_page` arguments.

result.next_step: File validated. Write it to disk now.
